issues.description: SearchDeck is incorrect; action should be PlayFromHand or similar to play from trash. SearchDeck searches deck, not trash.
Missing filter constraint for {Thriller Bark Pirates} type. Current filter only checks cost, ignores card type requirement.
Destination should support both 'board' (play) and 'life' (add to life cards face-up). Current DSL only targets board.
Second trigger 'Trigger' is invalid and unexplained. Effect should have single OnPlay trigger only, not two separate triggers.
Action should search trash, not deck. Card text specifies 'from your trash'.
